events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Oklahoma City Thunder

highlights.headline: Thunder top Spurs in pivotal Game 5 to take 3-2 series lead
highlights.description: Thunder top Spurs in pivotal Game 5 to take 3-2 series lead

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 32 points, Alex Caruso led another strong bench effort with 22 and the Oklahoma City Thunder moved one win away from a return trip to the NBA Finals by beating the San Antonio Spurs 127-114 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thunder top Spurs 127-114 in Game 5, move a win away from a return to NBA Finals

video.headline: Thunder top Spurs in pivotal Game 5 to take 3-2 series lead
